nodes.label: Cheeks (Dark Mode Icon)
nodes.description: Dark mode UI icon depicting the cheek anatomical area. Shows a close-up photographic rendering of the lower half of a face with emphasis on the cheek region. A thin curved line traces the cheek contour with a small mint/teal accent dot marker indicating the injection or treatment zone. Background is deep navy/dark blue. Skin tones appear warm and natural against the dark background. Style is clinical-premium photography-based icon with minimal annotation.

nodes.label: Cheek Anatomical Region
nodes.description: The anatomical cheek area shown from a three-quarter side profile view, highlighting the malar/zygomatic region commonly targeted for filler treatments such as Juvederm Voluma or Sculptra.

nodes.label: Mint Accent Injection Point Marker
nodes.description: Small teal/mint colored dot marker placed on the cheek contour line, indicating the treatment injection point. Color matches brand accent color #3FA68A used for verified/accent UI elements.

nodes.label: Dark Mode Icon Style
nodes.description: Dark mode variant of the body area icon. Uses deep navy/dark blue background consistent with dark theme. Light contour annotation line over facial photo. Paired with cheeks_light.png for light mode usage.
